_doc: Narrative metadata. REQUIRED. One per narrative directory.
_id: REQUIRED. Slug identifier. Must match the directory name. Lowercase, hyphens OK.
title: The Example Narrative
_genre: OPTIONAL. One of: novel, novella, short-story, investigation, geopolitical, intelligence-report, news-article, academic-paper, biography, memoir, essay, technical, legal, financial, social-media, transcript, other. Or any custom string.
_tags: OPTIONAL. Free-form string tags for filtering and grouping.
_source: OPTIONAL. Provenance of the narrative's source material. registered_source is a UUID linking to a Source record.
_project_id: OPTIONAL. Parent project slug. If set, the project must exist in projects/{slug}.json.
description: A sample narrative demonstrating all available fields in the archive format.
_description: OPTIONAL. Longer description of the narrative.
_authors: OPTIONAL. Author(s) of the original source material.
_language: OPTIONAL. ISO 639-1 language code (en, ru, de, fr, es, etc.).
_publication_date: OPTIONAL. ISO 8601 date of original publication.
_cover_url: OPTIONAL. URL to a cover image.
_custom_properties: OPTIONAL. Arbitrary key-value string pairs for user-defined metadata.
_entity_count: Informational cache. Importer recalculates from actual data.
_situation_count: Informational cache. Importer recalculates from actual data.
_timestamps: OPTIONAL. Auto-filled on import if missing.
